name: Easy Mints
recipeInstructions: Combine butter and water in a saucepan. Place over low heat until the butter melts. Remove from heat, then add salt and peppermint extract. Gradually add confectioner's sugar while stirring until the desired consistency is reached. If making colored candies, divide the mixture into parts and tint each part with food coloring. Knead until smooth. Mold into individual candies or form small rolls to slice. Refrigerate if desired before slicing at room temperature. Use immediately. Yield: 1 pound mints
